data.title: Markets Reverse Gains As Trump's 104% China Tariff Announcement Rattles Wall Street
data.description: Wall Street rally turns negative after confirmation of Trump's 104% tariff on China imports. Concerns over global trade escalation reignited.

data.title: Recession Risk Is High, But Analysts Say This Sector Is Shielded From Tariff Impact
data.description: Maia G. Crook, a JPMorgan analyst, says the probability of a U.S. recession has surged to 60%. That's up from 40% last month.

data.title: Cartesian Therapeutics Reports Strong 12-Month Data For Lead Cell Therapy In Myasthenia Gravis Patients
data.description: Cartesian reports 12-month data for Descartes-08 in myasthenia gravis; Phase 3 AURORA trial expected to begin in Q2 2025.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson's New 'Compelling Data' Shows Sustained Symptom Improvement In Muscular Disease Patients
data.description: Johnson & Johnson reports long-term efficacy and steroid-sparing benefits of nipocalimab in antibody-positive generalized myasthenia gravis.

data.title: Short Seller Sees 25% To 40% Downside In Monster Beverage Shares: 'Vulnerable To Escalating Threats'
data.description: Spruce Point Capital Management has announced a short position against Monster Beverage Corp (NASDAQ:MNST) as the short seller sees 25% to 40% downside risk.
